overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of Night City's urban streets. The player walks through neon-lit commercial areas, crosses streets with light traffic, and approaches the Night City Police Department building with a massive illuminated tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with food vendors

events.description: passes the street vendor NPC and moves toward the PieZ restaurant sign

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow commercial alleyway, passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: street vendor leaning against a container, watching the player pass by

entered.detail: rusted metal container with blue awning serving as a street food stall
large purple and white neon sign for PieZ restaurant mounted overhead
illuminated food vending machine with glowing product displays
pink neon sign for Brooklyn Barista visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow commercial walkway at night, passing a street vendor leaning against a container. The camera moves forward under the glow of a large purple 'PieZ' neon sign, with vending machines lining the right side and graffiti covering the walls.

events.description: exits the covered commercial area into an open pedestrian space with concrete planters

agents.ego_description: continuing through the pedestrian zone, navigating around planters and street furniture

entered.detail: large rectangular planter with palm trees and vegetation
tall modern street lamp illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving from the covered arcade into an open pedestrian promenade lined with concrete planters and sparse vegetation. The area features scattered street furniture and littered newspapers, transitioning toward a street crossing with visible road markings ahead.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt road surface
vehicle passes by on the left while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide city street, navigating between parked vehicles and watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: large brutalist building with blue neon signage reading Night City Police Department
tall vertical illuminated sign with multiple light panels

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide asphalt street marked with yellow lines, transitioning from the pedestrian area to the roadway. A vehicle passes by on the left as the Night City Police Department building becomes visible in the distance, its blue neon signage glowing against the night sky.

events.description: passing under the police department structure into darker shadowed area

agents.ego_description: walking along the police department plaza, passing parked vehicles and underpass structures

entered.detail: massive skyscraper covered in colorful digital advertisements and animated billboards
concrete underpass with green lighting underneath the police building

segments.scene_description: Walking through the plaza in front of the Night City Police Department, passing under concrete structures with green underlighting. A massive illuminated tower covered in digital advertisements dominates the left skyline, while parked vehicles line the right side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with mega tower view

events.description: approaching the burning barrel and abandoned vehicles in the open plaza

agents.ego_description: exploring the open plaza area, approaching the massive illuminated tower with advertisements

entered.detail: large sign reading IMPERIAL MALL on the building facade
metal barrel with fire burning inside, providing orange light

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an open plaza with the massive mega tower dominating the skyline, covered in vibrant digital advertisements. The camera passes a burning barrel and abandoned vehicles while the Imperial Mall sign becomes visible on the left, maintaining the cyberpunk atmosphere with neon lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped, neon-lit commercial alleyway out into a wide urban thoroughfare. It begins in a narrow walkway, passing a street vendor and vending machines under the vibrant purple glow of a PieZ neon sign. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed arcade opens into a pedestrian promenade characterized by concrete planters, sparse vegetation, and wind-blown litter. The scene then shifts from the sidewalk to a wide asphalt street, crossing yellow road markings as a vehicle passes by on the left. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal the Night City Police Department building in the distance, its blue neon signage cutting through the dark night sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that gradually opens up to reveal a towering corporate skyline. It begins by passing under heavy concrete structures accented with green underlighting, with a massive illuminated tower covered in digital advertisements looming over the left skyline. As the camera advances past a line of parked vehicles, the environment expands into a wider open plaza where the scale of the mega tower becomes even more dominant. The scene then shifts past a burning barrel and abandoned cars, before the Imperial Mall sign emerges on the left to complete the dense cyberpunk atmosphere.
